title: 0. Preamble and Scope
content:
0. Preamble and Scope

This document is the master specification for a unified, self-evolving creative-operating-system. It defines conceptual layers, directory and naming structures, procedural generation flows, and automation patterns that turn individual AI runs into contributions to a single, long-lived corpus. It is written so a future AI, given only this text plus environment variables, can reconstruct the system and extend it.

All paths and identifiers here are conceptual and use environment-variable placeholders such as $OS_ROOT, $ARCHIVE_ROOT, $PROMPT_ROOT, $REPO_ROOT, $ORG_ID, and $AUTOMATION_ENGINE. Implementation details (scripts, frameworks, services) are intentionally abstracted.

────────────────────────
1. Conceptual Layers of the Creative-Operating-System

1.1 Layer Overview

The OS is organized into conceptual layers that correspond directly to the LAYER axis in the naming grammar LAYER-DOMAIN-TYPE-ID-VERSION:

VISION
SYSTEM
WORLD
STORY
WORKFLOW
